name: backend-registry-pattern
description: Backend registry PoC complete. Approach B (Per-Environment Instance) validated with 22 passing tests. Resolution cascade: model x-persistence.backend → schema x-persistence.backend → registry default. Registry passed via IEnvironment.services.backendRegistry, matching existing DI pattern.
relevantCode: BackendRegistry class: register(), get(), has(), resolve(), setDefault(). Factory function createBackendRegistry() for configured construction. Meta-store integration via query interface (getSchema, getModel).
recommendation: ADOPT Approach B (Per-Environment Instance). Matches MST environment DI pattern, enables test isolation (no global state), supports different backends per environment. Add backendRegistry to IEnvironment.services.
